creator: me+fbsd@cameronkatri.com
text:
This has happened a few times now, zpool scrub finds no errors. I do have cores and can provide more information if needed

zpool status -v
  pool: zroot
 state: ONLINE
  scan: scrub repaired 0B in 00:00:31 with 0 errors on Tue Apr 16 20:00:55 2024
config:

        NAME          STATE     READ WRITE CKSUM
        zroot         ONLINE       0     0     0
          nda1p3.eli  ONLINE       0     0     0

errors: No known data errors
